E`lial B`rook  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search

Eá¿¯lial Bá¿¯rook - Toxxulia Forrest

Uploaded May 15th, 2022 by mlorente

  • This mob spawns at -374,+335,+18.26 by the water.
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

You say, 'what beasts of these woods?'

E`lial B`rook says, 'These lands are most abundant in poisonous creatures. Watch your step. I have even heard tales of some seeing the dreaded [plague dragon], but I believe that to be sheer myth.'

You say, 'plague dragon'

E`lial B`rook says, 'Like I told you, that is sheer myth. A great dragon whose breath can rot the flesh from your body in seconds?! Pfaw! This is surely another tale told by senile old men. Ha!'

You say, 'escaped prisoner'

E`lial B`rook says, 'There was an escaped prisoner named E'lial B'roon. He was supposed to be a crafty heretic from what I hear. Thank Quellious I have not met up with such an evil man. I shall watch my back for suspicious men such as that [magician in the forest].'

You say, 'magician in the forest'

E`lial B`rook says, 'There is a magician running around on the other side of the stream. I know becausee from time to time he comes to the stream. He never fishes or gets water, he just stands there as he is if waiting for something. He dropped something, a tunic. Can you [return the tunic] to him?'

You say, 'return the tunic'

E`lial B`rook says, 'Oh, good. Be careful! He may be the heretic escapee.'

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2025-12-14 09:22:38.

Level: 7
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-04-30 23:53:55
Known Loot:
Bones [Heretic's Bones]
Crude Adept's Cord
Crude Binding Powder
Crude Combatant's Shoulderpads
Necromancer Blood
Raw Crude Hide

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Deepwater Knights +20
  Craftkeepers +20
  Crimson Hands +20
  Gate Callers +20
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics -20
Quests:
  Heretic Battle

Report a correction

Post Comment
dialogue / quest
QuoteReply
# May 28 2022 at 12:39 PM Rating: Excellent
ElrozTAKP
Guru
286 posts
Used comments below to try and figure this out, here's what I got :

[Sat May 28 14:07:20 2022] You say, 'what beasts of these woods?'
[Sat May 28 14:07:21 2022] E`lial B`rook says, 'These lands are most abundant in poisonous creatures. Watch your step. I have even heard tales of some seeing the dreaded [plague dragon], but I believe that to be sheer myth.'

[Sat May 28 14:07:23 2022] You say, 'plague dragon'
[Sat May 28 14:07:23 2022] E`lial B`rook says, 'Like I told you, that is sheer myth. A great dragon whose breath can rot the flesh from your body in seconds?! Pfaw! This is surely another tale told by senile old men. Ha!'

[Sat May 28 14:07:40 2022] You say, 'what heretics?'
[Sat May 28 14:07:40 2022] E`lial B`rook says, 'Heretics! Thank Quellious the High Guard Sentinels are around to keep us safe from those evildoers!'

[Sat May 28 14:08:07 2022] You say, 'what magician in the forest?'
[Sat May 28 14:08:08 2022] E`lial B`rook says, 'There is a magician running around on the other side of the stream. I know becausee from time to time he comes to the stream. He never fishes or gets water, he just stands there as he is if waiting for something. He dropped something, a tunic. Can you [return the tunic] to him?'

[Sat May 28 14:05:35 2022] You say, 'return the tunic'
[Sat May 28 14:05:35 2022] E`lial B`rook says, 'Oh, good. Be careful! He may be the heretic escapee.'

Handed me this:
[Sat May 28 14:05:42 2022] You say, 'Tunic'
[Sat May 28 14:05:47 2022] You say, 'lore : stained tunic'

Went to Shintar:
[Sat May 28 14:16:34 2022] You say, 'Hail, Shintar Vinlail'
[Sat May 28 14:16:35 2022] Shintar Vinlail says, 'I have no time to answer questions, whelp! Now, leave this place before the sting of death finds the life in your veins!'

Handed Shintar the "Tunic" :
[Sat May 28 14:16:42 2022] Shintar Vinlail says, 'You beast! I shall send you back to the sty where you belong!'
[Sat May 28 14:16:42 2022] Shintar Vinlail says, 'That was not a very intelligent thing to do.'

He attacked me, no faction from the hand-in.

# Jun 03 2020 at 5:37 PM Rating: Good
Arog
Scholar
196 posts
I noticed that he doesn't give me experience even though he is dark blue to me at level 10. He does give the faction that I needed but no experience. Algthin Dasmore also doesn't give experience to my level 10 character and he is level 8 and dark blue to me but does give faction. I wonder if this is a bug and I should report it or is it intentional and why?

Algthin Dasmore also doesn't give experience to my level 10 character and he is level 8 and dark blue to me but does give faction. 1,563 posts
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Halleb hit E`lial B`rook for 28 points of non-melee damage.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by -20.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Your faction standing with Deepwater Knights has been adjusted by 20.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Your faction standing with Gate Callers has been adjusted by 20.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Your faction standing with Craftkeepers has been adjusted by 20.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] Your faction standing with Crimson Hands has been adjusted by 20.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:56 2015] You receive 8 copper from the corpse.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:57 2015] E`lial B`rook's corpse says 'My comrades will avenge my death.'
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:57 2015] E`lial B`rook is struck by a sudden burst of force.
[Tue Jul 28 09:41:57 2015] You have slain E`lial B`rook!

Spawn time
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2013 at 4:47 PM Rating: Good
loepoe
Sage
56 posts
Just because there have been differing spawn times posted, and I was bored working on Craftkeepers faction, I put a stop watch on it.

Spawns every 4 minutes 53 seconds...

Bring your fishing pole and bait, I caught a ton of Greengill Salmon and Kerra Catfish while I waited!

▲ Page top
Quest
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2003 at 5:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248030606
135 posts
If you ask him about an escaped prisoner, or who Moohank or Binnlin is, he talks about how there is an escaped heretic roaming around.. (He is the real heretic).. he names him as Elial B'roon. (if you want to convince someone you ARENT the criminal, dont give them a fake name that is one letter away from your REal name).. LOL.

He doesnt respond to the 'magician in the forest' tag he hints at, and just repeats the same thing over and over.

The plague dragon thing he mentions is Trakanon, and isnt really new. He was saying that for over a year now. =)

All in all, he is very bugged, and so is Shintar Vinlail, since Shintar says he is a bounty hunter tracking the escaped prisoner (Elial?), yet when you return his 'bones' to him, he says 'i dont need that right now..."...

*sigh old original eq broken quests and npc's*..

Quick Question
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2003 at 10:30 AM Rating: Good
Sequince
View User Forum
Scholar
662 posts
How do you figure out how many points you get/lose for killing an NPC? Is it just a guess or is there a way to find out how many points you'd need to go from Dubious to Aimable?
____________________________
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=744646

▲ Page top
easy
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2002 at 11:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255447530
19 posts
well my 13 mage was going to do the gloves of the gatecaller quest with the erudite gatecaller guild , ubt my faction wasnt high enough, so i hear about this dude i kill him a bunch and my faction goes up quite a bit but still not good enough then i find out the bones he drops can be turned in for faction as well so i turn in like 2 stacks and my faction says ur faction could not go any higher so i completed the quest and got the gloves but he is an easy solo
23 necro Evicksoul Lifesapper
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 12:00 AM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
Killing Elial Brook:
-20 points Heretics (Paineel)
+20 points Deepwater Knights (Erudin CLR/PAL Prexxus)
+20 points Gate Callers (Erudin MAG)
+20 points Craftkeepers (Erudin ENC)
+20 points Crimson Hands (Erudin WIZ)

He has 100 HP. If you can kill him with one nuke, his pet goes poof :). He always drops the Bones for the Heretic Battle quest, some copper, and about 1 time in 10 he drops a Necromancer Blood.

Another Heretic NPC you can kill for the same factions is Noclin Saah in the Paineel newbie yard.
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2003 at 7:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255893668
10 posts
How do you know the exact raise of faction?
Where do you look up these numbers?
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2004 at 6:39 PM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
Unfortunately there's no way to see exact faction numbers just from the messages, but there are indirect ways to figure it out.

For example: if your Heretics faction is at max and you kill this guy to lower your Heretics faction, your faction will reach max again after killing 20 kobolds in Warrens. So it can be inferred that this guy has a 20 point faction hit with Heretics.
▲ Page top
Question about points
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2003 at 1:39 PM Rating: Good
Sequince
View User Forum
Scholar
662 posts
To gain faction from a mob, all you have to do is be hit or hit in the fight once. And have the mob die. So if two or more people were in a group, would the points be slit up? You said there are 20 points per kill. So if two killed would that be 20 points or 10 points each? If it is not devided, then it shouldn't matter if it's camped or not just shoot an arrow or something, and you get the faction hit.
____________________________
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=744646
----------------
ShadowSoldier
Antonius Bayle
▲ Page top
RE: Question about points
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2003 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783850710
19 posts
No, does not matter how many in the Party, group, or raid, Every person that hits it gets the same amount of faction hit. 20 not matter what, its not divided up.
▲ Page top
RE: Question about points
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2003 at 10:19 AM Rating: Good
Sequince
View User Forum
Scholar
662 posts
Thanks. Appreciate the reply.

To be honest I've never heard of NPC's giving more then one faction hit per kill. Quests most definatly.

QUEST?
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 9:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248030606
135 posts
[Tue Mar 26 21:27:43 2002] You say, 'Hail, Elial Brook'
[Tue Mar 26 21:27:43 2002] Elial Brook says 'Good day to you. This is a dangerous forest for adventuring. Watch out for the [beasts of these woods].'
[Tue Mar 26 21:27:52 2002] You say, 'what beasts of these woods'
[Tue Mar 26 21:27:52 2002] Elial Brook says 'These lands are most abundant in poisonous creatures. Watch your step. I have even heard tales of some seeing the dreaded [plague dragon], but I believe that to be sheer myth.'

[Tue Mar 26 21:27:59 2002] You say, 'what plague dragon'
[Tue Mar 26 21:27:59 2002] Elial Brook says 'Like I told you, that is sheer myth. A great dragon whose breath can rot the flesh from your body in seconds?! Pfaw! This is surely another tale told by senile old men. Ha!!'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:10 2002] You say, 'what heretics'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:11 2002] Elial Brook says 'Heretics!! Thank Quellious the High Guard Sentinels are around to keep us safe from those evildoers!'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:26 2002] You say, 'who is binnlin'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:30 2002] You say, 'what escaped heretic'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:31 2002] Elial Brook says 'Heretics!! Thank Quellious the High Guard Sentinels are around to keep us safe from those evildoers!'

[Tue Mar 26 21:28:38 2002] You say, 'what escaped prisoner'
[Tue Mar 26 21:28:38 2002] Elial Brook says 'There was an escaped prisoner named E'lial B'roon. He was supposed to be a crafty heretic from what I hear. Thank Quellious I have not met up with such an evil man. I shall watch my back for suspicious men such as that [magician in the forest].'

RE: Agro
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 9:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248030606
135 posts
That guy is Knarthenne Skurl, and he is also a heretic, so watch out for him on his hill
▲ Page top
RE: Agro
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 9:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783302919
20 posts
As said earlier, the other guy will not aggro if you keep out of his range. However, keep an eye out for Sentiel Creot he wanders down to the docks on a regular basis and will kill anyone he sees attacking Elial Brooks.
▲ Page top
RE: Agro
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2002 at 10:52 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758800476
7 posts
The Fellow down the row is far enough away that if you pull from Elial's righthand side, he will not agro. He will only agro if you go near him so no fear there. Good hunting.
▲ Page top
Necromancer Blood
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 3:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My paladin has been working across Norrath getting faction with all the paladin guilds up to at least amiable. So now it was Elial's turn to contribute to this holy crusade. In 10 kills he dropped Necromancer Blood twice. All well and good, but what's it good for?
▲ Page top
Got killed by Khartenne Skurl
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 8:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762538880
10 posts
The other day while I was camping Elial Brook for faction, I was killed by a nearby NPC called Khartenne Skurl. This necro was red and dubious to me lvl 46 pally. I hailed him before he wouldn't talk to me, but after Elial ran away Khartenne assisted Elial and quickly killed me with a 700HP DD spell and some swift punches.
Just thought you might like to know.

Klurt,
46 paladin
Immortal Power
Rodcet Nife.
▲ Page top
Great faction in 2 hours.
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2001 at 6:36 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was a lvl 23 human paladin and had just killed guard fentallin in efp 1 too many times. After getting my corpse I figured I would go to erudin and do the inert tonic quest some to repair militia faction. Once I got to erudin, I found out that I could not do the quest until I had amiable faction with the craftkeepers. In a fit of desperation I found Elial Brook. After 2 hours of killing him(6 minute spawn x 20) I had gone from dubious to amiable with Deepwater Knights, Craftkeepers, Crimson Hands and the Gate Callers. I also had a stack of 20 "bones", so I took these and handed them to the mage(Crimson Hands) guild master and he gave me faction with both erudin guards, Crimson Hands, and something else which I have forgetten. That is how I went from dubious to amiable with almost everyone in erudin, and dubious to allied with the Crimson hands in 2 hours. Hope someone can use this information.


BTW, about 25 left gob ears in HHK(hand to captain Bosec) and 50 inert tonic repetitions took away atleast 1 militia guard killing.



Ansible Lighteyes, Paladin of 26 seasons.
▲ Page top
RE: Great faction in 2 hours.
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 10:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
The guy you give the bones to (Markus something) is indeed the mage guildmaster, but he's not a Crimson Hand - those are the wizards. He's a Gatecaller, and is on the top floor of their tower in Erudin Palace. You get positive faction to the Gatecallers (again, not the CH), the palace guard, and the High Council of Erudin by that quest. BTW, fifty inert tonic quests and I'm still "dubious" to the Corrupt Qeynos Guards - apparently I was perilously close to being KoS there.

Edited, Tue Feb 26 10:52:53 2002
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 2:19 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
I camped him for around 3 hours, and killed him 17 times. I then went to check my faction, and it had gone from dubious to amiable. And I also got the barnacle breastplate quest. I am a lvl 12 half elf ranger.

I plan to port there and take this guy down constantly till I can do the book quest. I have gotten different advice from everyone on what I have to do to get the card....

View User Forum
Anonymous
should kill him early and often. Killing him and turning in his bones gives faction for every guild in Erudin, except the merchants. By the way, the bones are not lore, in fact they are stackable.
He was an easy solo for my eighth level wizard. I regret not grouping and trying him earlier. He is a caster, and therefore has relatively few hit points for his level. I stood on the hill directly north of him and could get off two fire bolts before his pet was in melee range. He has a fear spell which he might rarely get in. If he does, get ready to use your shock of ice. You don't have to have him in your line of sight to use this spell. Once Elial falls, his pet will soon follow.
He is on a very predictable 6 minute timer, and if you hit him immediately after he pops, he will not have time to summon his pet.
In addition to the excellent faction, the experience is very good too. He doesn't drop much cash, but I did what I usually do and pulled out my fishing pole while meditating. The greengill salmon in the river sell for over 5 silver each, and I was pulling out five or six between each battle--very good money for level 8.
Faction, experience, and a little cash, what more could you ask for?
Another thing, us wizards get Tox Gate at level 20. This is where being loved by everyone in town really pays off. After a battle, you can teleport to Tox, walk to the Palace, sell your loot, visit the bank, resupply. Your mage needs gemstone spell components? Pick some up--for a few plat consideration. Then gate back to rejoin the group, unburdened and very much richer.
▲ Page top
My 2 cp worth
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783302919
20 posts
This guy (along with the Darkpaws and Rungupp) was among the first NPCs that I sought vengance against. He also made me the angriest. I was a lvl 5 Eurudite Wizzard just blundering about, trying to learn the terain of the forest when I saw this guy at a dock with a skelee near him. I did not know if he was a PC just hanging out or what. So, still keeping my distance I targeted his pet for con purposes. I may have taken a step or two closer, I cannot recall. The next thing I know, he says something like: "That was not a very wise thing to do." He then proceed to do his spell series and beat me silly. All I did was look at him the wrong way!
I killed him the first time when I was lvl 8 and had was lucky enought to show up before he could summon his pet. At lvl 10 I could solo him and his pet, but used all my manna to do it. I camped him at this point, but since I have a lot of mana (my int is 132), he does respawn and summon before I am ready to go, so I have to kill them both (darn...).
▲ Page top
RE: All good aligned Erudites
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 9:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783302919
20 posts
A little clarification to what was said about getting faction with all good Eudite factions:
Once when I was going out to seek vengance on this guy (see my other post here). I found a lvl 50-some-odd guy camping him for faction. He gave me all of the bones that he had collectected so far (26 to be exact). I turned them in. I am now ally with the Mages, and the High Council, but I was either indiferent or amiable with all others. The point I am trying to make is, turning in the bones only raises those two factions. Further the Peacekeepers (the clerics)faction is not raised by killing him and they are a good faction as well.
▲ Page top
RE: All good aligned Erudites
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2002 at 8:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Why would you use Toxx ports to go back to town? they put you farther away then just walking back up to Erudin, although I understand your idea. Once you and your group kills this guy enough times, your prices at the vendors inside Erudin Palace (which seem to be on same faction as others in palace) will be great.

Ps. As a necro, I am not welcome in erudin. The great thing is that I can kill this guy 20 times or so to make that no longer true, then I can go kill kobalds to fix my Heretic faction once again.

Thracken
Necromancer
Erudite

i think Thracken was thinking the particular post above mentioneing camping Elial, then Toxx Gating to Erudin. makes no sense in that scenario, but i think Anonymous switched gears without indicating it. he switched from talking about Elial in Toxx to talking about having the good faction to visit Erudin after Tp from anywhere else.

It's not always faster to walk back up to Erudin. What if my group is hanging out in the depths of Castle of Mist for example, or the 6th level of the Tower of Shadow? :)

Faction/Spawn rate
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2000 at 7:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1601252407597
4 posts
He does give good faction, and his spawn rate is on the 6 minute timer. My lvl 18 wizard could take him with one spell, and after 10 kills, i went from indifferent to amiable with gate callers and could do the ice goblin quest with the erudite wizards.

Elial Brook wil drop bones that are lore item and the bones are for the Heretic Battle quest.
He always as a pet with him so be careful when killing him. He can help rasie faction for the golves of the gatecaller quest.
